scripts.css: npm run scss && npm run prefix
scripts.dev: npm run css && concurrently "sass --watch assets/scss/styles.scss assets/css/styles.css --silence-deprecation=import --silence-deprecation=global-builtin --silence-deprecation=color-functions --silence-deprecation=if-function" "npm run serve"
scripts.build: sass assets/scss/styles.scss assets/css/styles.css --style=compressed --no-source-map --silence-deprecation=import --silence-deprecation=global-builtin --silence-deprecation=color-functions --silence-deprecation=if-function && npm run prefix
